sink_impls.description: Primary output format for line-by-line search results with optional colors, hyperlinks, and match highlighting
Structured JSON output format for programmatic consumption
Summary-only output format, shows counts and statistics without match lines
Test-only lossy UTF-8 conversion sink implementation

call_chain.name: Searcher::search_reader
call_chain.note: Grep searcher trait method that accepts Sink implementations

change_impact_map.change: Create new CSV printer module with Config, CSVBuilder, CSV<W>, and CSVSink structs
Implement Sink trait for CSVSink with matched(), context(), context_break(), binary_data(), begin(), finish() methods
Add re-exports: pub use csv::{CSV, CSVBuilder, CSVSink}; and add to pub mod csv; declaration
Add CSV variant to Printer enum: Printer::CSV(printer::CSV<NoColor<BufWriter<Box<dyn io::Write>>>>)
Add match arm for Printer::CSV in search_path() function to call printer.sink_with_path()
Add match arm for Printer::CSV in search_reader() function to call printer.sink_with_path()
Add --csv flag to CLI argument parser and instantiate CSV printer variant in builder logic
Reference Standard printer builder pattern when implementing CSV builder for consistency
